LAW AND MOTION 301, RE: DEFENDANTS DAVID DELL AND COOMBS & DUNLAP LLP'S MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16(C). NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DAVID DELL AND COOMBS & DUNLAP LLP'S MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16(C) IS GRANTED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING.
